series_metadata.series_description: Documents pertaining to any internal investigations of agency employees. Includes but is not limited to violations of Commission work rules, policies, Ohio Administrative Code or the Ohio Revised Code.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years following separation then image to machine readable or retain for 50 years following employee''s separation. ; Electronic: Retain for 50 years following employee''s separation., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
